user_query: could you please help me create a scope that is specifically for spots events?
final_answer_preview:
I can set that up. I just need a few details to create the scope the way you want. Here are some sensible defaults plus a few questions:

Suggested base name
- Options you can pick from (or tell me your own):
  - “Spots Events”
  - “Sports Events”
  - “Spot Events”
  - “Spots & Events” (if you want a broader branding)
- Note: The server will derive the URL route from the name you provide.
